scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:widget"
scripts.start: npm run build && uv run uvicorn main:app --app-dir backend --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist .venv backend/.venv && find . -type d -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} +
